steps.title: Identify the two-part structure
steps.content: The text first presents the idea that some Grande Terre species belong to clades older than the island's split from Gondwana around 80 million years ago. Then it introduces a study with much younger crown ages.

steps.title: Describe the conflict
steps.content: Choice A says the study clarifies the researchers' reasons, but it contradicts the idea. Choice B says researchers reconsidered, which the text never states. Choice C says the discrepancy is explained, but no explanation is given. The study results are incompatible with the earlier idea. The answer is D.
